action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Food not protected from potential source of contamination during storage, preparation, transportation, display or service.
Food contact surface not properly maintained.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Non-food contact surface improperly constructed. Unacceptable material used. Non-food contact surface or equipment improperly maintained and/or not properly sealed, raised, spaced or movable to allow accessibility for cleaning on all sides, above and underneath the unit.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Food contact surface not properly washed, rinsed and sanitized after each use and following any activity when contamination may have occurred.
